The Spot Movement Studio

The Spot is an inclusive movement studio offering weekly pilates classes, specialized movement workshops, and 1:1 stretch therapy.

No matter your body type, gender, or abilities, at The Spot you'll find movement support and community!

Now booking for April, May, and June workshops.

Book Your Spot

Pilates Classes

An hour-long group fitness class that takes place on a mat and uses mostly bodyweight. You may or may not break a sweat - but don't be fooled! It's a workout for every muscle, especially the deep core, pelvis, back, and shoulders.

More Info

1:1 Stretch Therapy

Lay down on a stretch therapy table as your muscles are stretched for you. This therapy mobilizes fascia, improves sleep, and helps you get the most out of your workouts.

More Info

Movement Workshops

Two hour deep-dives into areas that often experience injury from underuse or overuse. Not a workout exactly, but rather an opportunity to learn and practice stretching, mobilization, and strengthening techniques.

More Info
